questions.question: Explain the concept of a data bus and its significance in digital design. (3 marks)
questions.hint: Define data bus and explain its role in data transmission

questions.question: Describe the difference between a sequential and parallel bus architecture. (4 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the advantages and disadvantages of each architecture

questions.question: What is the purpose of a control bus in a digital system? (2 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of control bus in system control and synchronization
